summary: Comprehensive frontend testing after major App.js refactoring (from ~2160 lines to ~580 lines). All features tested successfully - login/logout, role-based dashboards, tab navigation, modals, and data management. The obsolete settings gear icon and Data Source modal have been successfully removed.

issues: Console warning: Chart width/height -1 when component renders before container size is determined. This is a minor Recharts issue that doesn't affect functionality.

passed_tests: Login page loads correctly with logo, Sign In/Register tabs, email/password inputs
Salesperson login (Bcardarelli@fshac.com) - Dashboard tab loads with KPIs, charts, and Closed Sales table
Salesperson - My Money block (Block 1) displays Total Revenue, Commission, Closed Deals, Leads, Closing Rate, Avg Ticket
Salesperson - How Can I Earn More? block (Block 2) displays SPIFF breakdown
Salesperson - What Am I Selling? block (Block 3) displays Unit Type, Revenue by Type, Monthly Revenue charts
Salesperson - Closed Sales block (Block 4) displays sales table with clickable rows
Salesperson - Sale Detail Modal opens when clicking on closed sale row, shows all details correctly
Salesperson - Follow-ups tab shows Action Required pipeline with 4 items
Salesperson - Pipeline Complete section shows leads that finished all steps
Salesperson - Client Detail Modal opens when clicking client name, shows notes, priority, closing flow progress
Salesperson - Data tab displays search, status filters (All/SALE/PENDING/LOST), New Lead button, Import XLS button
Salesperson - Data search filters correctly
Salesperson - Edit Lead Modal opens when clicking data row, shows all fields including SPIFF details
Admin login (Bsanchezcar@gmail.com) - Overview tab shows Company Totals with all KPIs
Admin - Tab labels are correct: Overview, Salespeople, All Data
Admin - Salespeople tab shows ranking, charts, user management
Admin - Click salesperson row filters dashboard to that salesperson
Admin - Filter banner appears with 'Show All' button when viewing filtered salesperson
Admin - All Data tab shows leads with Salesperson column
Logout button works correctly - returns to login page
No obsolete settings gear icon present (removed successfully)
Refresh button works correctly
Tab navigation works for both roles
critical_code_review_comments: Good: App.js successfully refactored from ~2160 lines to ~580 lines with proper component separation
Good: All components properly use data-testid attributes for testing
Good: Modals properly named and exported from Modals.jsx
Good: Constants properly centralized in lib/constants.js
Good: Shared UI components (SummaryCard, ChartCard, SpiffBrandCard, SectionHeader) properly exported from shared.js
Minor: Recharts shows console warning about negative chart dimensions on initial render - non-blocking
Verified: Obsolete settings icon and Data Source modal successfully removed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend refactoring tested successfully. App.js was split into DashboardTab, FollowupsTab, DataTab, Modals, shared.js, and constants.js. All functionality works as expected. Minor Recharts console warning about chart dimensions is cosmetic and doesn't affect functionality.
